concerns: Cancellation recorded in 2022 with Zurich Insurance Group.
High claim count (11 claims) recorded in 2024.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Prior insurance history spanning 2020 to 2024 indicates variable claims frequency, ranging from 2 claims in 2020 up to 11 claims in 2024. A policy cancellation was noted in 2022. Past carriers include Markel, Zurich, Chubb, and EMPLOYERS, with annual premiums ranging approximately between $580,000 and $630,000.
